title: Protocols from Sales et al. (2020) Rubisco activity: challenges and opportunities of NADH-linked microtiter plate-based and 14C-based assays
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"df4j6","text":"This collection of protocols includes four assays for measuring Rubisco activity that are used and discussed in the manuscript \"Rubisco activity: challenges and opportunities of NADH-linked microtiter plate-based and 14C-based assays\" (Sales et al. 2020).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":217,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7qovu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8sbv0","text":"Three of the protocols are NADH-linked microtiter plate-based assays for Rubisco activity that use alternative coupling enzymes:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"14q5","text":"1. GAPDH-GlyPDH, glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate-dehydrogenase and glycerolphosphate-dehydrogenase;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"15aav","text":"2. PEPC-MDH, phosphoenolpyruvate-carboxylase and malate-dehydrogenase;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2hgcm","text":"3. PK-LDH, pyruvate-kinase and lactate-dehydrogenase.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6hu62","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7j7ka","text":"The radiometric assay for Rubisco activity measures the incorporation of 14CO2 into 3-phosphoglycerate (3-PGA).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":73,"length":2},{"style":"sub","offset":77,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"de4h7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"blv44","text":"The fifth protocol describes the purification of 2,3-bisphosphate-dependent phosphoglycerate mutase (dPGM), which is required for the NADH-linked microtiter plate-based assays 2 (PEPC-MDH) and 3 (PK-LDH).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Cristina Rodrigues Gabriel Sales
